summary: A superb matrix mix captures a blistering 1977 performance highlighted by a soaring Terrapin opener, electric Estimated Prophet and punchy Around & Around.
review: The recording is an expertly crafted matrix that balances crystal‑clear soundboard detail with the lively ambience of the crowd, delivering one of the most immersive listening experiences in the archive. Musically the show is a showcase of early‑’77 fire – a powerful Terrapin Station opener, tight jams on Estimated Prophet and an aggressive Around & Around that keep the energy high throughout.

ai_rating.rationale: Average reviewer rating ≈ 4.15 across 20 reviews, with overwhelming praise for both performance and matrix sound quality; only a few low‑star outliers do not outweigh the consensus.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Pristine balance of soundboard clarity and audience ambience; superb mix with crisp vocals, trebles and bass. Some listeners note long audience sections between songs, but overall fidelity is outstanding.

standout_songs: Help on the Way > Slipknot! > Franklin's Tower
show_quality.setlist_flow: The set opens with an inspiring Terrapin Station that sets a high‑energy tone, followed by tight jams on Estimated Prophet and a fiery Around & Around. The flow is consistently aggressive and engaging, keeping momentum despite occasional extended audience tracks.

band_member_comments.Bob: Referenced as ‘Bobby’ with an energetic vocal that could blow the roof off during Around & Around.
